---
name: "Feature request"
about: "Suggest a new feature, improvement or enhancement to the project"
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Thank you for taking the time to suggest an improvement. Please fill out the sections below —
clear, concise tickets are more likely to get implemented quickly.
-->

## Summary

A short, descriptive title is often enough. Start the issue title with a short tag (the `title` field above
is prefilled with "[FEATURE]"). In this section, give a one-paragraph summary of the feature.

Example: "Add an optional dark theme for the neowx-material skin to improve readability at night."

## What do you want?

Describe the feature you would like to see. Be concrete: what should the project do that it does not do now?

- What exactly should change or be added?
- Who will benefit from this feature?
- Are there any constraints or requirements (platforms, compatibility, performance)?

## Screenshots, mockups, or drawings

If helpful, attach a screenshot, sketch, or mockup showing the expected behavior or UI. You can drag files here or
paste images directly into the issue.

Example: attach a mockup image or an ASCII drawing showing layout changes.


## Additional context

Add any other context or example code that might help the maintainers evaluate the request.
